disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A flash fire ignited his clothing and boiling oil spilled over him in a confined kitchen about 15 minutes ago
trigger_question_examples: What happened just before this started?
Can you tell me exactly how he got burned?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The oil exploded and caught his clothes on fire in the kitchen about fifteen minutes ago. It happened so fast.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Hoarse voice, a tight burning throat and harsh noisy breathing, with singed facial hair
trigger_question_examples: Has his voice changed or does his throat feel tight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His voice has gone all hoarse, his throat feels tight and burning, and his breathing is really noisy. The hair on his face looks singed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe pain in the blistered areas but a complete absence of pain over the charred patches on the chest
trigger_question_examples: Where does it hurt, and are there any parts he can't feel?
What do the burned areas look and feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The blistered bits hurt terribly, but he says he can't feel anything at all where his chest is burned black and hard.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lightheadedness, feeling very cold and shivering, looking pale and sweaty — signs of circulatory compromise and heat loss
trigger_question_examples: Does he feel faint or dizzy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He says he feels really dizzy and freezing cold and he's shivering; he looks pale and sweaty.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapidly developing swelling of the face, lips and body
trigger_question_examples: Is any part of him swelling up?
Are his face or lips changing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His face and lips and body are all puffing up really fast.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Large area of the front of the body, both arms and the face is burned
trigger_question_examples: How much of his body is burned?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His whole chest and front, both arms and his face are burned — it's a lot of him.
